name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative, I’m under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

If they didn't fear my message, they wouldn't try to destroy me.

The Democrat National Committee has fired off more attacks against me than any other Republican running for President.

I'm not surprised. Polls show me leading Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania.

That makes me the biggest threat to the coronation Hillary and the Democrats have planned.

**[Will you help me fight back against the Democrats by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905667:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, from the day I announced my candidacy for President the left hurled one smear after another.

In the last year, the Democratic National Committee attacked me 203 times on social media and in press releases.

In fact, in April they targeted me 71 times!

That was the highest number of any candidate in any month.

And since my first week on the trail, Hillary's allies in the liberal media threw 'gotcha' questions at me to destroy my campaign and select our party's nominee.

So I need your help to fight back.

You and I can't allow attacks by the Democrats and their pals in the press to pick our nominee.

Another tired establishment candidate is a recipe for defeat.

Americans are hungering for a candidate to upend the Big Government status quo.

I proved when I forced President Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire I was serious about defeating the Washington Machine.

And just recently I proposed driving a stake through the heart of the IRS with my 14.5% Fair and Flat tax plan - which will return over $2 trillion to the paychecks of American workers and kick start our stagnant economy.

The American people recognize I mean business and the polls prove I'm the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton.

So the left's attack dogs are pointed in my direction.

The more they smear me, the more I know our movement to take our country back is growing.

But I need your help to fight back right away.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 so my campaign has the resources necessary to combat the Democrats attacks on email, social media, and online ads](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905667:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905668:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905669:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905670:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905671:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905667:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905672:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905673:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28905674:27769463784:m:1:879035888:3445A1E6BC8F4CE01E7BD515FD9318B2:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: WATCH LIVE: America's role in the world
body:
| |

---
---
|
Friend -

I'm headed to the Atlantic Council to talk about the cornerstone of this campaign: America's role in the world and my comprehensive plan to protect our national security.

This election will continue to revolve around how the next president will tackle the challenges of global leadership - from defeating radical Islam and supporting democracy around the world to revving the engine of a stable economy.

We've endured seven years of a hands-off approach to leadership on the world stage. **This morning at 10:00 a.m. EST, I'll present my approach for putting America back in a leadership position around the world.**

[**You can watch the live stream of my speech here.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28916591:27772299461:m:1:877327319:5882809905C825412D81FFBC65268C1B:r)

Hope you'll tune in!

Lindsey Graham

PS: Don't forget to share the live stream with your friends on [Facebook](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28916592:27772299461:m:1:877327319:5882809905C825412D81FFBC65268C1B:r) and [Twitter](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28916593:27772299461:m:1:877327319:5882809905C825412D81FFBC65268C1B:r)!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28916594:27772299461:m:1:877327319:5882809905C825412D81FFBC65268C1B:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: Elizabeth Conatser, Finance Director, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Sign Lindsey's Birthday Card
body:
Lindsey's 60th Birthday is on July 9th. Will you sign his card? Friend -- Tomorrow is Lindsey's 60th birthday! Did you get a chance to sign his birthday card?

If not, **[please follow this link to add your name right now!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28907135:27774584450:m:1:877327319:28C2A7E8DBA3FE9B6538C18F710660CE:r)**

Lindsey has been busy meeting with voters to discuss the critical issues facing our nation, so he hasn't had much time to think about this momentous birthday. **That's exactly why we want to thank him for his dedication to our country and surprise him with birthday wishes from friends and supporters across the United States.**

**[I hope you will join me and add your name to his card today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28907135:27774584450:m:1:877327319:28C2A7E8DBA3FE9B6538C18F710660CE:r)**

Elizabeth Conatser
Finance Director
Lindsey Graham 2016

PS. If you haven't yet done so, don't forget to [**download a copy of Lindsey's free eBook**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28907136:27774584450:m:1:877327319:28C2A7E8DBA3FE9B6538C18F710660CE:r) about his early years and life before heading to Congress.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28907135:27774584450:m:1:877327319:28C2A7E8DBA3FE9B6538C18F710660CE:r)
---

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Ben
subject: what now?
body:
Peter, The Declaration of Independence is inspiring, but it was the brave patriots who fought for it who actually secured our liberty.
To view this email as a web page, go [ here.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=000ca751475ebd6acbc234f7750daea6775047d626e4d7329dea8fe9617c908b6d9df98bb582aeae)

---
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,The Declaration of Independence is inspiring, but it was the brave patriots who fought for it who actually secured our liberty. When we celebrated the 4th, we honored not merely the ideals of the Declaration, but the actions of countless soldiers, many of them Virginians. Now that the firework smoke has cleared and the grill is cleaned, it's time to think about what we're doing to not merely celebrate, but preserve and advance the freedom we have been given.

While none of us will hopefully be called to make the greatest sacrifice for freedom, I want to invite you to to make a sacrifice of time this month in the service of economic freedom and limited government. Reposting articles on Facebook and arguing with liberal friends is great, but what really changes our country for the better is one-on-one contact with our fellow citizens.

I get it: some people don't feel they are cut out for door knocking or making phone calls. I'm sure many of our country's patriot's didn't feel cut out for soldiering. However, just as their bravery was essential to the success of our fledgeling republic then, grassroots activism is essential to turning the tide of big-government today.

As Benjamin Franklin said, "it's a republic if you can keep it."

Calloused knuckles from knocking doors or rasped voices from making hundreds of calls - these sacrifices pale in comparison to what our soldiers have given up for our liberty - but they are an essential part of advancing liberty in Virginia and we cannot succeed unless everyone is contributing to help.

If we do not connect with our neighbors, they may not know that freedom is under attack, who is to blame, and how they can hold those politicians accountable. Someone has to choose to stand in the gap between the freedoms we hold dear and those who want to sacrifice liberty at the altar of statism.

A declaration to acknowledge liberty has always required a dedication to preserve it. Reply to this email and say "I choose to help Virginia" if you will sacrifice time to help us advance economic freedom in Virginia.

Will you be the first of thousands to reply? One more Virginian fighting for freedom can make a difference and I hope to hear from you. Let's keep our republic and the freedoms we hold dear.

In Liberty,

Ben Knotts
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

---
| |

\--------------------
Your support will help us continue the fight for economic freedom. [Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=000ca751475ebd6a9075c51f9874ec1fbbb538dd7a4510cb5a3bf2ac19592bd954a42a7d6cdb6e7a "Please donate $5, $10, or $15 today!")
---
| | This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [**view our policy**](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=000ca751475ebd6a76daa784698c437ba57b48b63a369ee384feb52ab2e25917a78291a2b0e89b1c) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 2111 Wilson Blvd, Ste. 350 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=000ca751475ebd6a0bfbb65ec68d859e33a0fa391dcc650702ad522f3055f80d8d658d72c4b7b4e0) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=000ca751475ebd6afba58b3e84416cb92351b47596ab86324329e279da43b55f460667ccb9b05d41)******
---

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: [Recap] Jobs Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Yesterday, Marco delivered a policy speech on technology and the
21st Century job market in downtown Chicago at 1871, an
entrepreneurial hub for digital startups.

"I come before you today to discuss my ideas to spur American
innovation onward, to ensure the rise of the machines will not be
the fall of the worker, and to create a new American Century -
propelled by a revitalized American Dream, and captured by a
vibrant middle class."

-- Marco Rubio

Click here to watch the video of Marco's full speech with Q&A
following.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42857586:17980245951:m:3:1349778030:74A7480480BEF17B7ADA46087FDE23FA:r

Click here to read the full text of Marco's speech on
MarcoRubio.com
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42857587:17980245951:m:3:1349778030:74A7480480BEF17B7ADA46087FDE23FA:r

"The race for the future will never be won by going backward. It
will never be won by hopping in Hillary Clinton's time machine to
yesterday. She seems to believe pumping more of today's money
into yesterday's programs will bring prosperity tomorrow. It will
not. Nor will thinking small."

-- Marco Rubio

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJHC3eVpNF

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I want to say “Happy Birthday!”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I want to write you a birthday note. | Friend --

I really enjoy sending birthday notes to the people who matter in my life.

I want to make sure they always know there’s someone thinking of them on their special day.

Some people have a tough time remembering birthdays, but you can ask around -- I almost never forget one!

[**I'd love to add yours to my list, so I can pass along my well wishes on your special day.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

If you have a loved one you think I should pass on a birthday note to as well, [**let me know and I'll make sure to add them, too.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Some of my favorite memories revolve around birthdays -- watching Chelsea, and now Charlotte, grow up, each year brings something new and exciting. That's something to celebrate.

**I hope I'll get the chance to wish a happy birthday to you:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/your-birthday-card/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary

P.S. [**Don't forgot to pass along any birthdays for your friends and family!**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMwMDMxNzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzMxMjcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Act on Climate
body:
#
[**Sign the Petition: Add your name as a co-sponsor of my
Low Income Solar Act of 2015**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9bfb/1657692490/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/solar-act?source=em150708su-c&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=climatechange&utm_content=petition")
Friend -
Our country faces more serious problems today than at any time since the Great Depression.
And if you include the planetary crisis of climate change, it may well be that the challenges we face now are more dire than at any time in our modern history.
Scientists are telling us that if we do not transform our energy system away from fossil fuels and into sustainable energy, our planet could be ten degrees Fahrenheit warmer by the end of this century.
That will mean more droughts, more famine, more floods, rising sea levels, and more human suffering.
**Our job, in this moment, is not to think small. The United States must lead the world in fighting climate change.**
Throughout my career, I've introduced legislation to combat climate change - I even co-wrote the Green Jobs Act with Senator Hillary Clinton that passed in 2007.
But we must think even bigger.
In 2010 I introduced the 10 Million Solar Roofs and 10 Million Gallons of Solar Hot Water Act. In 2012 I introduced the End Polluter Welfare Act because it is immoral that millions of young Americans can't afford a decent college education while we're providing huge tax breaks for ExxonMobil, the most profitable corporation in America.
And just yesterday, I introduced the Low Income Solar Act of 2015.
The bill would provide loans and grants to make solar power affordable for community facilities, public housing, and low-income family homes. These families are the hardest hit by rising utility prices and among the most vulnerable to the perils of a changing climate.
[**If you agree it 's time for America to think big and lead the world on climate change, add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my Low Income Solar Act of 2015.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9bfb/1657692490/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/solar-act?source=em150708su-c&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=climatechange&utm_content=petition")
When we talk about our responsibilities as human beings, and as parents, there is nothing more important than leaving this country, and this planet, habitable for our kids and grandchildren.
The debate is over.
The scientific community has spoken in a nearly unanimous voice.
**Climate change is real, it is caused by human activity, and the United States must lead the world in reversing its effects.**
This moment requires a massive investment in solar, wind, and geothermal. My Low Income Solar Act is a commonsense proposal to create jobs, make energy affordable for the most vulnerable among us, and protect the planet for future generations.
[**Add your name as a co-sponsor of my Low Income Solar Act today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9bfb/1657692490/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/solar-act?source=em150708su-c&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=climatechange&utm_content=petition")
Thank you for joining me.
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9bf8/1657692490/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150708c")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9bf9/1657692490/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb200c/43f17890/5c3e1392/621d9be6/1657692490/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: "" Friend - Our country faces more serious problems today than at any time since the Great Depression. And if you include the planetary crisis of climate change, it may well be that the challenges we face now are more dire than at any time in our modern history. Scientists are telling us that if we do not transform our energy system away from fossil fuels and into sustainable energy, our planet could be ten degrees Fahrenheit warmer by the end of this century. That will mean more droughts, more famine, more floods, rising sea levels, and more human suffering. Our job, in this moment, is not to think small. The United States must lead the world in fighting climate change. Throughout my career, I've introduced legislation to combat climate change - I even co-wrote the Green Jobs Act with Senator Hillary Clinton that passed in 2007. But we must think even bigger. In 2010 I introduced the 10 Million Solar Roofs and 10 Million Gallons of Solar Hot Water Act. In 2012 I introduced the End Polluter Welfare Act because it is immoral that millions of young Americans can't afford a decent college education while we're providing huge tax breaks for ExxonMobil, the most profitable corporation in America. And just yesterday, I introduced the Low Income Solar Act of 2015. The bill would provide loans and grants to make solar power affordable for community facilities, public housing, and low-income family homes. These families are the hardest hit by rising utility prices and among the most vulnerable to the perils of a changing climate. "" When we talk about our responsibilities as human beings, and as parents, there is nothing more important than leaving this country, and this planet, habitable for our kids and grandchildren. The debate is over. The scientific community has spoken in a nearly unanimous voice. Climate change is real, it is caused by human activity, and the United States must lead the world in reversing its effects. This moment requires a massive investment in solar, wind, and geothermal. My Low Income Solar Act is a commonsense proposal to create jobs, make energy affordable for the most vulnerable among us, and protect the planet for future generations. "" Thank you for joining me. Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Rob Johnson, Perry 2016
subject: Experience on the border matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perry for President, Inc
body:
| | **** Dear Friend,

Earlier this week _The O'Reilly Factor_ discussed border security on Fox News & said, "You think you're a hard ass on immigration? Listen to Rick Perry." [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMwMDU4NzUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzYyNzk5S0&mt=1&rt=0) Consider Governor Perry's experience when it came to securing the border while he was governor of Texas (the state with the longest border with Mexico). Just last summer, Gov. Perry deployed the Texas National Guard which worked to combat illicit activities in the border region, like drug, weapons and human trafficking. He even told President Obama in Dallas that, _" If the federal government won't secure the border, Texas will!"_ [**If you think it 's going to take a President in Washington with this kind of ex****perience and actual results dealing with border security, please chip in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to support Rick Perry for President.**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjMwMDU4NzUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzYyNzk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Best,
Rob Johnson
Chief Strategist, Perry for President

**[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwMDU4NzUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzYyNzk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwMDU4NzUS1&r=MTIxNTA5NzYyMjAxS0&b=0&j=NjAwNzYyNzk5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**
